tasks.title: Generate Force Text Unity scene files (.unity) with GUID management
tasks.description: Research shows Force Text mode makes Unity fully AI-writable — this is the key architectural change. (1) In unity-scene-generator.ts, add generateUnityScene() outputting .unity in YAML format with headers: %YAML 1.1, %TAG !u! tag:unity3d.com,2011:. (2) Create unity-guid-manager.ts generating deterministic 128-bit hex GUIDs from asset paths via MD5 hash for consistent cross-refs. (3) Generate .meta files for every script/scene/asset with matching GUIDs. (4) Scene includes: OcclusionCullingSettings, RenderSettings (from theme IR), LightmapSettings, NavMeshSettings. (5) Root GameObject with Transform as hierarchy root. (6) Generate EditorSettings.asset with m_SerializationMode: 2 (Force Text). Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Add camera, lighting, and environment GameObjects to Unity scene YAML
tasks.description: Bare minimum scene objects for Unity to render anything. (1) In unity-scene-generator.ts, add Main Camera GameObject: Transform, Camera (FOV from player IR, near/far clip), AudioListener. (2) Directional Light: Transform (rotation from theme IR direction), Light (color, intensity, shadows from theme). (3) Environment in RenderSettings YAML: ambient light, fog settings, skybox reference. (4) EventSystem GameObject for UI interaction. (5) Unique fileIDs internally consistent (Transform refs GameObject, Camera refs GameObject). (6) Cross-references use {fileID: N} with correct IDs. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Generate terrain heightmap mesh for Unity export
tasks.description: No terrain generation exists in Unity export. (1) Create unity/templates/scripts/world/TerrainGenerator.cs. (2) Read heightmap from Resources/Data/geography.json at runtime. (3) Generate Unity Terrain with TerrainData: set heightmapResolution, SetHeights() from IR array, set size from world dims. (4) Terrain layers by slope: grass (< 0.3), rock (0.3-0.6), cliff (> 0.6). (5) Detail resolution with grass detail mesh. (6) TerrainCollider for physics. (7) Alternative: ArrayMesh with MeshRenderer + MeshCollider if TerrainData too complex. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Implement road mesh generation for Unity export
tasks.description: Unity has no road generation — road data exists in IR but isn't turned into geometry. (1) Create unity/templates/scripts/world/RoadGenerator.cs. (2) Read roads from level descriptor (waypoints, widths, roadTypes). (3) Generate Mesh quad strips along waypoint paths with configurable width. (4) Materials: dirt=brown, stone=gray, paved=dark gray. (5) Elevate +0.05f above terrain. (6) Widen at junctions. (7) MeshFilter + MeshRenderer + MeshCollider per segment. (8) Batch per settlement to reduce draw calls. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Add character animation controller for Unity export
tasks.description: No animation support in Unity templates — characters are static. (1) Create unity/templates/scripts/characters/CharacterAnimator.cs. (2) Animator state machine: Idle, Walk, Run, Attack, Interact, Talk, Die. (3) Parameters: Speed (float), IsGrounded (bool), IsAttacking (trigger), IsInteracting (trigger), IsTalking (bool). (4) Transitions: Idle↔Walk at Speed > 0.1, Walk↔Run at Speed > 5.0, Any→Attack/Interact on trigger. (5) In PlayerController, update Speed from velocity.magnitude each Update(). (6) In NPCController, update from NPC state. (7) Graceful fallback if no Animator found. (8) Read clip names from character data JSON. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Enhance Unity HUD with survival bars, compass, and interaction prompts
tasks.description: Unity has basic HUD but no survival bars, compass, or interaction prompts. (1) Extend HUDManager.cs: add survival bars (hunger, thirst, temperature, stamina) as icon + progress bar below health — visible only when survival enabled. (2) Compass bar at top center: N/NE/E/SE/S/SW/W/NW from camera rotation. (3) Interaction prompt at bottom center: '[E] Talk / Open / Pick Up / Gather' when near interactable. (4) Detect interactables via overlap sphere (2m). (5) Crosshair reticle at screen center. (6) Canvas with proper anchoring for resolution scaling. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create main menu and settings screen for Unity export
tasks.description: No main menu exists in Unity export. (1) Create unity/templates/scripts/ui/MainMenuUI.cs. (2) Canvas: title (world name), New Game, Continue, Settings, Quit buttons. (3) New Game → SceneManager.LoadScene(). (4) Settings panel: Audio (master/music/SFX sliders), Graphics (quality dropdown, resolution, fullscreen, VSync), Controls (sensitivity, invert-Y). (5) PlayerPrefs for save/load. (6) Quit → Application.Quit() with #if UNITY_EDITOR check. (7) Add both scenes to EditorBuildSettings.asset. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create inventory UI screen for Unity export
tasks.description: InsimulInventorySystem.cs has 382 lines of logic but no visual UI. (1) Create unity/templates/scripts/ui/InventoryUI.cs. (2) Grid: ScrollRect + GridLayoutGroup with slot buttons (Image icon + TextBlock count). (3) Selection highlights, detail panel: name, description, weight, effects, Use/Drop/Equip buttons. (4) Toggle Tab, Time.timeScale=0 while open. (5) Category tabs: All, Weapons, Armor, Consumables, Quest Items, Materials. (6) Player stats sidebar: Health, Energy, Gold, Carry Weight. (7) Connect to InsimulInventorySystem. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create quest journal UI for Unity export
tasks.description: QuestTrackerUI exists but is minimal HUD widget — no full journal. (1) Create unity/templates/scripts/ui/QuestJournalUI.cs. (2) Split: ScrollRect quest list left, details right. (3) Entries: name, completion bar, type icon (main=star, side=diamond). (4) Details: description, objectives with checkmarks, rewards, quest giver. (5) Tabs: Active, Completed, Failed, All. (6) Toggle J, pause. (7) Track button to set active tracked quest. (8) Connect to InsimulQuestSystem. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create full-screen world map for Unity export
tasks.description: MinimapUI exists but no full world map. Essential for open-world. (1) Create unity/templates/scripts/ui/WorldMapUI.cs. (2) Top-down 2D: RawImage with render texture or procedural drawing. (3) Settlement markers with name/population labels. (4) Road lines between settlements. (5) Quest markers: yellow exclamation (available), question (turn-in). (6) Player position as white arrow with facing. (7) Pan (click-drag) and zoom (scroll) with lerp. (8) Toggle M, pause. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Add NPC schedule-driven behavior to Unity NPCController
tasks.description: NPCs stand at spawn or patrol randomly. (1) In NPCController.cs, add schedule system reading from character data JSON. (2) Create GameClock.cs singleton: in-game time at 24x speed (20 min = 1 day), OnHourChanged event. (3) Each Update(), check hour vs schedule — set NavMeshAgent destination on change. (4) Walk between locations, don't teleport. (5) Idle at destination facing building entrance. (6) Fall back to patrol if building doesn't exist. (7) GameClock as MonoBehaviour singleton. (8) No-schedule NPCs use existing patrol. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Complete survival system in Unity SurvivalSystem.cs
tasks.description: Unity SurvivalSystem is a 64-line stub. (1) Replace with full implementation processing needs each Update(). (2) Decay: need -= decayRatePerSecond * Time.deltaTime. (3) At warningThreshold: OnNeedWarning event, flashing HUD icon. (4) At criticalThreshold: CombatSystem.TakeDamage(damagePerSecond). (5) Recovery: Eat(itemId), Drink(itemId), Sleep(hours) consume inventory items. (6) Temperature by proximity to temperatureZones. (7) Load from Resources/Data/survivalConfig.json. (8) Integrate with HUDManager show/hide. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Complete resource gathering system for Unity export
tasks.description: Unity ResourceSystem is a 29-line skeleton. (1) Replace with full implementation. (2) Load nodes from Resources/Data/resourceNodes.json. (3) Spawn: brown cylinder (wood), gray cube (stone), metallic sphere (iron), blue crystal, green bush (food). (4) Gather: within 2m + E → world-space Canvas progress bar → add to inventory. (5) Deplete after maxYield: gray material, reduced scale. (6) Respawn coroutine after respawnTimeSeconds. (7) Check toolRequired in inventory. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create dialogue UI panel for Unity export
tasks.description: ChatPanel.cs exists but is basic. Need proper RPG/educational interface. (1) Create/enhance unity/templates/scripts/ui/DialoguePanel.cs. (2) Bottom panel: NPC name, typewriter coroutine (30 chars/sec), response buttons. (3) Portrait placeholder (colored Image + initial Text). (4) Language learning: large target language, small translation, Listen button. (5) Responses after typewriter completes — up to 4. (6) Close with Escape/Goodbye, OnDialogueEnded event, restore timeScale. (7) Connect to InsimulDialogueSystem. (8) Slide-up animation. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Add Packages/manifest.json with glTFast and required Unity packages
tasks.description: Research shows glTFast is essential for Unity GLB import. (1) In unity-project-generator.ts, ensure manifest.json includes: com.unity.cloud.gltfast (6.9.1+), com.unity.inputsystem (1.8.1+), com.unity.textmeshpro (3.0.9+), com.unity.render-pipelines.universal (17.0.3+). (2) Add com.unity.ai.navigation for NavMesh. (3) Include UnityGLTFShaderVariantCollection in GraphicsSettings.asset to prevent shader stripping. (4) Valid JSON with correct dependency format. (5) scopedRegistries if needed. Typecheck must pass.
